title: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners!
